description: Local representative performance budgets. Budgets include Python subprocess startup and import time so the gate catches severe whole-command regressions.

numerical_validation_small.description: SBML-backed recast plus numerical validation profile on a one-state decay model.

recast_small.description: SBML-backed parse, simplified recast, and Antimony formatting on a one-state decay model.

symbolic_validation_small.description: SBML-backed recast plus symbolic validation profile on a one-state decay model.

trajectory_validation_small.description: SBML-backed recast plus trajectory validation profile on a one-state decay model.
